# terrible_community_general_sl_vm (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against

### Optional

- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `cpus` (Number) Count of cpus to be assigned to new virtual instance.
- `datacenter` (String) Datacenter for the virtual instance to be deployed.
- `dedicated` (Boolean) Flag to determine if the instance should be deployed in dedicated space.
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `disks` (String) List of disk sizes to be assigned to new virtual instance.
- `domain` (String) Domain name to be provided to a virtual instance.
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of nameâ†’value).
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `flavor` (String) Specify which SoftLayer flavor template to use instead of cpus and memory.
- `hostname` (String) Hostname to be provided to a virtual instance.
- `hourly` (Boolean) Flag to determine if the instance should be hourly billed.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `image_id` (String) Image Template to be used for new virtual instance.
- `instance_id` (String) Instance ID of the virtual instance to perform action option.
- `local_disk` (Boolean) Flag to determine if local disk should be used for the new instance.
- `memory` (Number) Amount of memory to be assigned to new virtual instance.
- `nic_speed` (Number) NIC Speed to be assigned to new virtual instance.
- `os_code` (String) OS Code to be used for new virtual instance.
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `post_uri` (String) URL of a post provisioning script to be loaded and executed on virtual instance.
- `private` (Boolean) Flag to determine if the instance should be private only.
- `private_vlan` (String) VLAN by its ID to be assigned to the private NIC.
- `public_vlan` (String) VLAN by its ID to be assigned to the public NIC.
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `ssh_keys` (String) List of ssh keys by their ID to be assigned to a virtual instance.
- `state` (String) Create, or cancel a virtual instance. Specify `present` for create, `absent` to cancel.
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution
- `wait` (Boolean) Flag used to wait for active status before returning.
- `wait_time` (Number) Time in seconds before wait returns.

### Read-Only

- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
